name: Behavioral Threat Assessment Intake
description: Behavioral threat assessment intake for threat assessment teams, school administrators, HR professionals, and security personnel initiating a structured threat assessment on an individual of concern. Evaluates the threat type, pathway indicators, precipitating stressors, target identification, leakage, access to means, and inhibitors to produce a threat assessment intake profile with risk level, intervention recommendations, and safety planning.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
